name: glob
description: List workspace files whose path matches a glob pattern (supports `*`, `?`, and `**` for any depth, e.g. `**/*.go`, `cmd/**`, `*.md`). Returns paths sorted, relative to the workspace root. Respects credential and vendored-tree exclusions. Prefer this over `bash find/ls` for locating files by name.

pattern.description: Glob pattern matched against workspace-relative paths. `**` matches across directory separators.

path.description: Optional subdirectory (workspace-relative) to search under. Defaults to the whole workspace.
